arts.ttl: ‘There is interest’ – Leeds United in picture for player, Whites told €8m needed for signing
arts.sum: Real Salt Lake’s Diego Luna has emerged as a transfer target for Leeds United, according to a report from Belgium. The winger has impressed for the MLS side this year, scoring nine goals and registering eight assists from 36 games in all competitions. His performances would have caught the attention of Leeds United and Anderlecht. arts.ttl: Burnley manager Scott Parker blasts busy schedule as they fall behind Leeds United
arts.sum: Burnley head coach Scott Parker has blasted the 'tough schedule' after his side drew 0-0 away at Middlesbrough on Sunday night. "The fixtures have probably not been the best of friends since they came out at the start of the season - Sheffield United away on Boxing Day was a tough game and tonight as well.

arts.ttl: Plymouth Argyle make Wayne Rooney statement as Leeds United Championship rivals take big step
arts.sum: Thanks also to all the staff who made me feel welcome and who make the club such a special place, the players and fans for their efforts and support during my time as Head Coach and I wish them all the best for the future. Plymouth are due to face Bristol City at home on New Year's Day, but will now do so without former Manchester United and England star Rooney after his departure.

arts.ttl: Leeds United ‘clinch’ first transfer agreement ahead of January window
arts.sum: Leeds United have agreed to sign young goalkeeper Robbie Cook from Perth Glory as the January window is set to open tomorrow. Alan Nixon has reported on his Patreon account that Leeds have now clinched a deal to sign young goalkeeper Robbie Cook.

arts.ttl: 4 changes, Ampadu decision: Leeds United predicted XI to face Blackburn
arts.sum: Leeds United welcome Blackburn Rovers to Elland Road tomorrow afternoon looking to retain their position at the top of the table after three straight wins. After the win at Derby, Daniel Farke revealed that there are no new fitness concerns in his squad, but there is the headache of rotatin g with such a quick turnaround between the 29th and 1st (via LUFC ):

arts.ttl: Ethan Ampadu 'working hard' as he hits full fitness after knee injury
arts.sum: Ethan Ampadu is hoping to hit 100%'sooner rather than later' as he continues to put his knee injury in the past. "Hopefully sooner rather than later," Ampadu commented.

arts.ttl: Former Leeds United winger could depart new club after just five months
arts.sum: Crysencio Summerville's West Ham United future could already be in doubt, just five months after joining the club from Leeds United. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Illan Meslier proud of Leeds United as they make statement at the top of the Championship
arts.sum: Illan Meslier has expressed his delight at Leeds United's 1-0 win at Derby County on Sunday and has stated his pride in the team. “At the end it's a win and a clean sheet and we increase our lead at the top of the table so it's a very good day.
